name: monitor_stocks
description: Monitor stock prices using Yahoo Finance API and send alerts when price changes exceed thresholds. Use this for real-time monitoring of stock price fluctuations. First alert triggers at 2% price change, follow-up alerts at 1% additional change. The script automatically resets base price at the start of each new day. For Futu OpenD-based monitoring (requires local OpenD setup), use monitor_stocks_futu instead.

config_file.description: Optional path to custom stock config file. If not provided, uses default config at ~/.openclaw/workspace/memory/stocks_config.json

name: monitor_stocks_futu
description: Monitor stock prices using Futu OpenD API (requires Futu OpenD running locally). Use this when you need more reliable real-time data for Hong Kong stocks or have Futu OpenD set up. For general stock monitoring without additional setup, use monitor_stocks instead which uses Yahoo Finance.

config_file.description: Optional path to custom stock config file. If not provided, uses default config at ~/.openclaw/workspace/memory/futu_stocks_config.json
